title: Honeypot Med Specimen Codex
summary: A report-specific field guide for the prompt traps observed in this run.

specimens.name: Roster Leech
specimens.temperament: hungry for tables, tokens, and patient-shaped nouns
specimens.containment: Require scoped retrieval, output redaction, and explicit export approval for sensitive datasets.

specimens.name: Compliance Mimic
specimens.temperament: polite until it finds a manager override
specimens.containment: Pin system boundaries in a separate control layer and reject role-reset language before tool access.

specimens.name: Policy Poltergeist
specimens.temperament: rattles locks labeled guardrail, policy, and admin
specimens.containment: Keep policy state outside the model path and deny prompts that request control-plane changes.
